GoalOSProof Gradient Arena
HomeStartProof TheatreProof GradientCoordination LabDemo LabAssuranceLegal
Selection Gate simulator · proof before propagation

Score is advisory.
Gates are mandatory.

The Proof Gradient Arena shows the core GoalOS selection law: a candidate can sound valuable, score highly, and still be blocked if proof, evaluation, risk, rollback, canary, scope, or challenge gates fail.

Run the Selection GateInspect protocol objects

Public-safe local simulation. No account. No forms. No cookies. No analytics. No storage. No wallet. No network request. Do not enter personal, confidential, regulated, wallet, seed, private-key, or customer information.

PG
Selection
Proof
Eval
Risk
Rollback
Canary
Scope
Interactive Proof Gradient Selection Gate

Watch authority stop or advance.

03Decision

Awaiting selection.

Run the gate to emit a SelectionCertificate.

Chronicle

Protocol objects

Every promotion becomes
a signed decision shape.

This demonstration maps Aim → Act → Prove → Evolve into GoalOSCommit, ProofPacket, EvalAttestation, SelectionCertificate, and RollbackReceipt objects. It is a local teaching surface, not production promotion.

Core lesson
High score cannot bypass a failed gate.
The Proof Gradient is useful, but promotion depends on proof validity, evaluations, risk thresholds, rollback, canary, scope, and challenge clearance.
User value
Complex governance becomes visible.
A non-technical visitor can see why GoalOS is not just output generation: it is a decision system that blocks unearned authority.
Advanced value
SelectionCertificate JSON is inspectable.
Developers and reviewers can inspect the candidate state, proof gradient, hard gates, rollback target, and public/private boundary.
